items.title: First batch of Kailash-Mansarovar Yatra pilgrims reaches Tibet
items.summary: Officials from the Kumaon Mandal Vikas Nigam (KMVN) – the nodal agency for the yatra – stationed at the Dharchula base camp said the 48-member batch crossed the Lipulekh Pass at...

items.title: New dinosaur species with neck as long as cricket pitch discovered in Thailand
items.summary: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.

items.title: Trump Cuts Habitat Protections for Endangered Species
items.summary: The rule change ends a safeguard that had been in place for 50 years and could hasten the demise of imperiled animals.
